# Contributing to WP-Stateless

Hi there! Interested in contributing to WP-Stateless? We'd love your help. WP-Stateless is an open source project, built one contribution at a time by users like you.

## Where to get help or report a problem

* If you have a question about using WP-Stateless, start a discussion on [WP-Stateless Talk](https://talk.jekyllrb.com).
* If you think you've found a bug within WP-Stateless, open an issue in the repository.
* If you think you've found a bug within Jekyll itself, [open an issue](https://github.com/wp-stateless/wp-stateless/issues/new).
